channel.title: Jira
channel.description: An XML representation of a search request

item.title: [SCRUM-71] Add architectural documentations
item.summary: Add architectural documentations

item.title: [SCRUM-68] Make the Admin Panel
item.summary: Make the Admin Panel

item.title: [SCRUM-67] Improve landing page UI
item.summary: Improve landing page UI

item.title: [SCRUM-66] Fix bug register fields not showing
item.summary: Fix bug register fields not showing

item.title: [SCRUM-65] Generate weekly report - Week 7
item.summary: Generate weekly report - Week 7

item.title: [SCRUM-63] As a user, I can view a map visualization
item.summary: As a user, I can view a map visualization

item.title: [SCRUM-62] As a user, I can filter and search for donations
item.summary: As a user, I can filter and search for donations

item.title: [SCRUM-61] As a user, I can view the donation detail
item.summary: As a user, I can view the donation detail

item.title: [SCRUM-60] Add project setup guide
item.summary: Add project setup guide

item.title: [SCRUM-59] Properly setup laravel and nextjs
item.summary: Properly setup laravel and nextjs

item.title: [SCRUM-58] Text on register is not visible
item.summary: Text on register is not visible

item.title: [SCRUM-57] As an admin, I want to manage categories
item.summary: As an admin, I want to manage categories

item.title: [SCRUM-56] Manajemen Kategori
item.summary: Manajemen Kategori

item.title: [SCRUM-55] Fix the .env example to use PostgreSQL
item.summary: Fix the .env example to use PostgreSQL

item.title: [SCRUM-54] Add frontend skill and simplify skill to the project
item.summary: Add frontend skill and simplify skill to the project

item.title: [SCRUM-53] Overhauling the JIRA (Epic, PBIs, Asignees, Priority, Story Points)
item.summary: Overhauling the JIRA (Epic, PBIs, Asignees, Priority, Story Points)

item.title: [SCRUM-52] As a user, I can view dashboard summary
item.summary: As a user, I can view dashboard summary

item.title: [SCRUM-51] As a user, I can export reports
item.summary: As a user, I can export reports

item.title: [SCRUM-50] As a user, I can view donation map visualization
item.summary: As a user, I can view donation map visualization

item.title: [SCRUM-49] As a receiver, I can view claim history
item.summary: As a receiver, I can view claim history

item.title: [SCRUM-48] As a user, I can view notifications
item.summary: As a user, I can view notifications

item.title: [SCRUM-47] As a donor, I receive claim notifications
item.summary: As a donor, I receive claim notifications

item.title: [SCRUM-46] As a receiver, I can upload proof of pickup
item.summary: As a receiver, I can upload proof of pickup

item.title: [SCRUM-45] As a receiver, I can claim a donation
item.summary: As a receiver, I can claim a donation

item.title: [SCRUM-44] As an admin, I can approve or reject donation entry
item.summary: As an admin, I can approve or reject donation entry

item.title: [SCRUM-43] As a donor, I can edit and cancel the donation entry
item.summary: As a donor, I can edit and cancel the donation entry

item.title: [SCRUM-42] Implement notification system for donation updates
item.description: Set up notifications (email, SMS, or in-app) to inform users about donation status changes and important updates.
item.summary: Implement notification system for donation updates

item.title: [SCRUM-41] As an admin, I can view and manage all donation entries
item.description: Enable admins to view, filter, and manage all donation records, including updating statuses and resolving issues.
item.summary: As an admin, I can view and manage all donation entries

item.title: [SCRUM-40] As an admin, I can generate donation reports and analytics
item.description: Provide reporting and analytics features for admins to monitor donation trends, volumes, and impact.
item.summary: As an admin, I can generate donation reports and analytics

item.title: [SCRUM-39] Implement donation approval and verification workflow
item.description: Develop the workflow for admins to approve, verify, or reject donations before they are processed.
item.summary: Implement donation approval and verification workflow

item.title: [SCRUM-38] As a donor, I can view the status of my donations
item.description: Allow donors to track the progress and status of their submitted donations.
item.summary: As a donor, I can view the status of my donations

item.title: [SCRUM-37] As a user, I can create a new donation entry
item.description: Allow users to submit new donations, specifying details such as items, quantities, and pickup/drop-off preferences.
item.summary: As a user, I can create a new donation entry

item.title: [SCRUM-36] As an admin, I can search and filter users by criteria
item.description: Enable advanced search and filtering options for administrators to easily find users based on specific criteria such as role, status, or registration date.
item.summary: As an admin, I can search and filter users by criteria

item.title: [SCRUM-35] As an admin, I can view a list of all users
item.description: Enable administrators to view a paginated and searchable list of all registered users in the system.
item.summary: As an admin, I can view a list of all users

item.title: [SCRUM-34] As an admin, I can edit user roles and permissions
item.description: Allow administrators to assign or modify roles and permissions for users to control access levels within the application.
item.summary: As an admin, I can edit user roles and permissions

item.title: [SCRUM-33] As a user, I can update my profile information
item.description: Allow users to edit and update their personal information such as name, email, and contact details.
item.summary: As a user, I can update my profile information

item.title: [SCRUM-32] As an admin, I want to log user activity
item.description: Develop a system to log user activities for auditing and security purposes.
item.summary: As an admin, I want to log user activity

item.title: [SCRUM-31] As an admin, I can deactivate or delete user accounts
item.description: Provide functionality for administrators to deactivate or permanently delete user accounts as needed.
item.summary: As an admin, I can deactivate or delete user accounts

item.title: [SCRUM-30] Dashboard dan Pelaporan
item.summary: Dashboard dan Pelaporan

item.title: [SCRUM-29] Admin dan Governance
item.summary: Admin dan Governance

item.title: [SCRUM-28] History dan Tracking
item.summary: History dan Tracking

item.title: [SCRUM-27] Klaim dan Proses Donasi
item.summary: Klaim dan Proses Donasi

item.title: [SCRUM-26] Donation Management
item.summary: Donation Management

item.title: [SCRUM-25] Manajemen User
item.summary: Manajemen User

item.title: [SCRUM-24] Implement account lockout after multiple failed login attempts
item.description: Add security by locking user accounts after a set number of failed login attempts to prevent brute-force attacks.
item.summary: Implement account lockout after multiple failed login attempts

item.title: [SCRUM-23] As a user, I can reset my password
item.description: Implement functionality for users to reset their password if they forget it, including email verification and secure password update.
item.summary: As a user, I can reset my password

item.title: [SCRUM-22] As a user, I can log out of the system
item.description: Allow users to securely log out from their account to protect their session.
item.summary: As a user, I can log out of the system

item.title: [SCRUM-21] As a user, I can log in to the system
item.summary: As a user, I can log in to the system

comments.comment:
Flag added

Not Done
Benerin ya sampe bisa login. Jangan lupa PR

item.summary: Membuat Landing Page

item.summary: Autentikasi User

item.summary: Membuat slack server

item.summary: Melaporkan sprint review di Slack

item.title: [SCRUM-16] Melakuakn setup Next.js dan Laravel
item.summary: Melakuakn setup Next.js dan Laravel

item.title: [SCRUM-15] Melakukan integrasi Jira dengan Github
item.summary: Melakukan integrasi Jira dengan Github

item.title: [SCRUM-13] Membuat repo BagiPangan di github org
item.summary: Membuat repo BagiPangan di github org

item.title: [SCRUM-12] Melakukan set up supabase
item.summary: Melakukan set up supabase

item.title: [SCRUM-1] As a user, I can register an account
item.summary: As a user, I can register an account

comments.comment: Sebagai pendonor ataupun penerima dari donasi makanan, saya ingin mengisi form registrasi agar bisa membuat akun
